docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,529.48 FILED BY CHEN, MY JANE TAING AS TO DEFENDANT TESLA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MY JANE TAING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, MY JANE TAING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TESLA, INC. JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF TAKES NOTHING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MY JANE TAING AS TO DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-14-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TONY MARKOULIS FILED BY DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MY JANE TAING CHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.(TONY MARKOULIS) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED.
